title: desmidorchis quadrangula
intro: Desmidorchis quadrangula, also known as the four-angled orchid, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Orchidaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits associated with Desmidorchis quadrangula include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Desmidorchis quadrangula often involve drying and crushing the plant's aerial parts, which can then be used to make teas, infusions, or decoctions.
